overall.description: First-person perspective walking down a dark dirt trail through tall grass at night, illuminated by a flashlight beam. The scene appears to be rendered in a game engine, featuring silhouetted trees in the distance and a large rock formation passing by on the right side.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dark dirt trail illuminated by a flashlight, with tall grass on both sides and a large rock formation visible on the right. The path leads toward a distant line of silhouetted trees against the night sky.

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the dark trail past the rock formation, with the flashlight illuminating the dirt path ahead and tall grass lining both sides of the route. The distant tree line remains visible in the darkness ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey down a dark dirt trail that leads deeper into a desolate nocturnal landscape. It begins with a flashlight beam cutting through the darkness, illuminating a narrow path flanked by tall grass and a large rock formation on the right. As the camera moves forward, the perspective glides past the rock formation while the light continues to flicker across the dirt and surrounding vegetation. The scene then maintains its steady progression toward a distant line of silhouetted trees that stand starkly against the night sky. Finally, the path stretches onward into the gloom, keeping the distant tree line as the sole focal point in the darkness ahead.
